title: Add frontend UI for needs_setup status — prompt user to connect services
goal: 작업이 needs_setup 상태가 되면 프론트엔드에서 '이 작업을 완료하려면 X 연결이 필요합니다' 모달을 표시한다. '연결하기' 버튼은 setup 페이지의 해당 서비스로 이동, '링크로 대신하기' 버튼은 폴백 실행을 트리거한다.

test_requirements.expected: function calls POST /task/{id}/retry with fallback=true parameter

test_requirements.case: Main page detects needs_setup status during polling
test_requirements.expected: when task status is needs_setup, shows setup prompt modal

test_requirements.case: Setup prompt modal shows connection name and reason
test_requirements.expected: modal displays setup_message from task result_data

test_requirements.case: Connect button navigates to setup page
test_requirements.expected: clicking Connect goes to /setup with connection_id highlighted

test_requirements.case: Fallback button triggers retry with fallback
test_requirements.expected: clicking Use Fallback calls retryWithFallback and resumes polling
no window.open or browser-only APIs used

constraints: Reuse the modal pattern from approval popup (Spec 24)
Setup prompt shows: setup_message, connection name, two buttons (Connect / Use Fallback)
If fallback_available is false, hide the fallback button
Use existing useLanguage() t() for button labels
Do not add new npm dependencies
Must work in both browser and Tauri
